---
title: "Dr. Gang He"
image: files/gang-he-profile.jpeg
#page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: /posts
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 90%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: Mainpage
      href: https://www.ganghe.net
    - icon: globe
      text: SBUpage
      href: https://www.stonybrook.edu/commcms/est/people/core_faculty/ghe.php
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:gang.he@stonybrook.edu
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/drganghe
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/DrGangHe
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://mastodon.social/@hegang      
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/hegang
    - icon: lightbulb
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8416-1965  
    - icon: archive
      text: Scopus
      href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55607981900
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vf90AuEAAAAJ
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Research Gate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gang-He-19
---

<link rel="me" href="https://mastodon.social/@hegang">


:::{#hero-heading}

Welcome to my personal website!

I'm an energy scholar, researcher, and teacher. I'm an assistant professor in the Department of Technology and Society at Stony Brook University. I study energy systems modeling, energy and climate policy, and clean energy transition.


### Experience

Assistant Professor, Department of Technology and Society, Stony Brook University, 2015 - present

Research Associate, Program on Energy and Sustainable Development, Stanford University, 2008 - 2010

### Education

Ph.D., Energy and Resources, University of California at Berkeley, 2015

M.A., Climate and Society, Columbia University, 2008 

B.S., M.S., Geography, Peking University, 2006

:::


## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::
